articles.title_en: EU weighs scaled-back visa ban on former Russian military personnel, with Italy and France opposing stricter restrictions
articles.lead_en: EU member states are negotiating a scaled-back visa ban on Russian military personnel after Italy and France objected to the original proposal, Euronews reports. Under the revised measure, restrictions would apply only to short-term visas and only to those who took direct part in the war in Ukraine.

articles.title_en: A night in photos: Kyiv takes another Russian strike while Ukraine hunts Russia’s refineries, an airfield, and its ‘shadow fleet’
articles.lead_en: Russian forces hit Kyiv again overnight into July 8, even as Ukraine’s military launched a fresh wave of attacks on Russia’s oil infrastructure. Ukrainian drones struck so-called shadow fleet tankers in the Sea of Azov, an industrial zone in Nizhnekamsk that’s home to two oil refineries, refineries in Saratov and Ufa, and a military airfield in Borisoglebsk, in the Voronezh region.

articles.title_en: Senator Kastyukevich compared the Ukrainian Armed Forces militants attacking hospitals and ambulances to the disease

articles.title_en: Times: NATO uses Palantir platform to track Russian troop movements
articles.lead_en: According to the newspaper, Maven, already used by the UK Ministry of Defense, combines data from alliance countries, allowing one to identify vulnerabilities in the alliance's defense plans and make more informed decisions about the future deployment of personnel
articles.title_raw: Times: НАТО задействует платформу Palantir для отслеживания перемещений войск РФ
articles.lead_raw: По данным газеты, Maven, уже используемая Минобороны Великобритании, объединяет данные стран альянса, позволяя выявлять уязвимые места в оборонительных планах альянса и принимать более обоснованные решения о будущей дислокации личного состава

articles.title_en: Russia says Kostiantynivka has fallen. Kyiv claims it still holds the city. Both are wrong.
articles.lead_en: In recent days, alongside reports of drone and missile strikes on cities, factories, and gas stations, the state of the front lines has suddenly become a major topic of discussion — apparently because Donald Trump has returned as a mediator in the negotiations. Vladimir Putin told him about the fighting in the ruins of Kostiantynivka, in Ukraine’s Donetsk region — a key city the Russian president claims his army now holds.

articles.lead_raw: Военные ВС РФ уничтожили роботизированные комплексы противника

articles.title_en: Commander Tucha: The Ukrainian Armed Forces in Aleksandrovka mined the approaches to positions
articles.lead_en: The enemy did not want to miss the entry of the Russian Armed Forces, the military said
articles.title_raw: Командир Туча: ВСУ в Александровке минировали подходы к позициям
articles.lead_raw: Противник не хотел пропустить захода ВС РФ, сообщил военный

articles.title_en: Battalion commander Agalu: The Ukrainian Armed Forces together with civilians tried to leave Konstantinovka
articles.lead_en: According to the serviceman, Russian soldiers quickly identified the enemy by tattoos
articles.title_raw: Комбат Агалу: ВСУ вместе с гражданскими пытались выйти из Константиновки
articles.lead_raw: По словам военнослужащего, что российские бойцы быстро выявляли противника по татуировкам

articles.title_en: Battalion commander Agalu: The Ukrainian Armed Forces conducted military operations in Konstantinovka under the guise of civilians
articles.lead_en: According to the serviceman, Russian fighters immediately suppressed the enemy’s force
articles.title_raw: Комбат Агалу: ВСУ вели боевые действия в Константиновке под видом гражданских
articles.lead_raw: По словам военнослужащего, российские бойцы сразу подавляли силу противника
